_comment: Copy this to ~/.config/roster-focus/config.json and edit. Rules are evaluated TOP TO BOTTOM; the first rule with an event active right now wins (iOS allows only one Focus at a time). If no rule is active, all Focuses are turned off.

rules._comment: On-call shifts take priority over normal work shifts, so it is listed first.
keyword matches a case-insensitive substring of the event title, so only 'Gym ...' events on the Personal calendar trigger this one.
